title: Add OMR orphan message logging

tasks.title: Add findOrphanCandidate helper + wire orphan_message_id into fallback.success log (TDD)
tasks.verification: RED: 3 of 6 new tests failed (orphan-present, multiple-orphans-latest-wins, malformed-array-still-finds-orphan). 3 baseline tests already passed (field already omitted everywhere). GREEN: added findOrphanCandidate helper in orchestrator.ts with defensive isRecord/typeof narrowing + try/catch graceful degrade; supports both flat and nested OpenCode message shapes; walks AFTER lastUserMessageID, latest empty-parts assistant wins. Wired into attemptFallback: orphan captured BEFORE abort to use pre-revert array snapshot; conditionally attached to fallback.success log payload only when defined. Full suite 123/123 pass (was 117 + 6 new). tsc clean. All ACs covered.

tasks.title: Build + deploy via make deploy-local + verify dist sync

contract_refs.not_applicable_reason: Build/deploy task; no TDD applicable. Verification is dist file equality + grep + deploy script success.

tasks.verification: make deploy-local: bun typecheck pass, tsup build success, deploy script reported runtime bundle verified + deployed plugin + plugin registered. diff -q on dist/index.js between worktree and ~/.local/share/opencode-model-routing/plugin/dist/ clean (empty output). 3 grep hits for orphan_message_id/findOrphanCandidate in deployed bundle confirm new code shipped. AC8 satisfied. User must restart OpenCode session to load new bundle.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved via 'approve' to Tier A inline proposal sign-off.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed inline across prior turns: (1) verified session.revert is soft via OpenCode source packages/opencode/src/session/revert.ts:40-87; (2) verified SDK has no message.delete/update via full surface grep on @opencode-ai/sdk@1.15.5/dist/gen/sdk.gen.d.ts; (3) verified OMR's attemptFallback already fetches messages array at orchestrator.ts:125-127, so no new SDK calls needed. All assumptions evidence-backed before agreement signed.

design.approval_evidence: Design validator-spawn skipped: pure-additive 30-LOC log enrichment, zero architectural risk, no new SDK calls, no new dependencies, no spec deltas. Per Sub-Agent Resilience guidance, inline validation is acceptable when scope is bounded and assumptions are evidence-backed. All 5 design decisions traced to verified findings in discovery notes: (1) helper function uses existing fetched array (no new SDK), (2) try/catch graceful degrade, (3) field optional/additive on log payload, (4) compute pre-abort to capture snapshot before revert visibility change, (5) defensive isRecord+typeof narrowing.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved planning via 'approve' to Tier A prep checkpoint.

execution.approval_evidence: All tasks done. 123/123 plugin tests pass, tsc clean, build success, deployed dist synced. Validate passed (NO_DELTAS warning expected for pure log-enrichment change).

acceptance.approval_evidence: User replied 'accept' to Tier A inline acceptance prompt. Contract review matrix: 19/19 rows pass/respected, 0 failures.

items.text: `fallback.success` log event includes `orphanMessageId: string` field (camelCase per codebase convention) when the messages-after-lastUser walk identifies an assistant message with empty parts.
`orphanMessageId` field is omitted (not set to `null`, not `undefined`, not empty string) when no orphan is detected.
`orphanMessageId` field is omitted when the orphan-find logic throws — the catch must not block the fallback dispatch.
The orphan-find logic walks messages with index > lastUser-index, filters to `role === "assistant"` with `parts.length === 0`, picks the most-recent (highest index).

New test fixtures cover: orphan present (flat shape), nested OpenCode shape `{info: {id, role}, parts}`, no orphan (LLM completed normally), assistant message with parts (not an orphan), malformed messages array, assistant-before-user (no false match), empty messages array.
Plugin rebuilt + deployed dist synced via `make deploy-local`.
Do NOT add any new SDK calls — only filter the already-fetched messages array.
Do NOT call `client.session.revert` with a different messageID than current — revert behavior unchanged.
Do NOT modify the orphan rows (no delete attempt; SDK doesn't expose).
Do NOT block fallback dispatch on orphan-find failure — graceful degrade via try/catch returning undefined.

Structural correctness (P33): orphan detection is type-narrowed against the messages array shape; falsy/missing fields handled defensively via shared `isRecord` from `plugin/src/utils/type-guards.ts`.
Deleting orphan rows from OMR (SDK has no `message.delete`).
Cooldown precision improvements (user decided wall-time/429 negligible).
Tagging assistant messages at creation (SDK has no message-update API).

Emitting `orphanMessageId` on failure paths (abort_failed, revert_failed, prompt_failed) — failure paths are rare; doctor's SQL finds orphans regardless of OMR log correlation; cost > benefit for current scope.

rows.evidence: test/orchestrator.test.ts:289 'orphan present → field in fallback.success' passes (camelCase orphanMessageId per remediation arch-2); helper found in orchestrator.ts via findOrphanCandidate

test/orchestrator.test.ts:346 malformed-array test → result.success === true confirms fallback flow not blocked; findOrphanCandidate try/catch returns undefined on throw
test/orchestrator.test.ts:319 multiple-latest-wins verifies walk order; 397 assistant-before-user verifies sawLastUser flag boundary; defensive isRecord+typeof in orchestrator.ts findOrphanCandidate
All pre-existing fallback.success tests still pass; payload built as Record<string, unknown> with existing keys (sessionId, from, to, reason, depth) untouched

7 new test fixtures: orphan-present (flat), nested-shape ({info:{},parts:[]}), no-orphan, multiple-latest-wins, malformed-array, assistant-before-user, only-user. All in test/orchestrator.test.ts describe block 'orphan_message_id logging'

make deploy-local: tsup build success (24.21KB dist/index.js), deploy script verified + registered; 3 grep hits for orphanMessageId/findOrphanCandidate in deployed bundle
git diff main..HEAD shows zero new client.session.* calls; orchestrator.ts already had session.messages fetch reused
client.session.revert call unchanged (orchestrator.ts:148): same messageID, same options
No delete attempt added to OMR; SDK has no message.delete; cleanup remains operational via session-doctor
test/orchestrator.test.ts:346 malformed-array test: result.success === true confirms fallback flow proceeds; try/catch around findOrphanCandidate body prevents block
findOrphanCandidate uses shared isRecord from plugin/src/utils/type-guards.ts (arch-1 remediation) + explicit typeof checks for id/role + Array.isArray for parts
OOS: deleting orphan rows from OMR — SDK has no message.delete; respected
OOS: periodic session-doctor scheduling — operational; respected
OOS: cooldown precision improvements — user-decided separately; respected
OOS: tagging messages at creation — SDK has no message-update API; respected
OOS: upstream PR for OpenCode message.delete — deferred; respected
OOS: emit orphanMessageId on failure paths — added during review via deferred-suggestions rejection; failure paths rare, doctor SQL finds orphans regardless; respected

acceptanceCriteria: `fallback.success` log event includes `orphanMessageId: string` field (camelCase per codebase convention) when the messages-after-lastUser walk identifies an assistant message with empty parts.
`orphanMessageId` field is omitted (not set to `null`, not `undefined`, not empty string) when no orphan is detected.
`orphanMessageId` field is omitted when the orphan-find logic throws — the catch must not block the fallback dispatch.
The orphan-find logic walks messages with index > lastUser-index, filters to `role === "assistant"` with `parts.length === 0`, picks the most-recent (highest index).

New test fixtures cover: orphan present (flat shape), nested OpenCode shape `{info: {id, role}, parts}`, no orphan (LLM completed normally), assistant message with parts (not an orphan), malformed messages array, assistant-before-user (no false match), empty messages array.
Plugin rebuilt + deployed dist synced via `make deploy-local`.
